input: multi-view user-item interaction graphs (e.g., social, semantic, collaborative views)
output: ranked list of items per user
backbone: meta knowledge-enhanced multi-view graph contrastive learning framework
loss: meta knowledge transfer contrastive learning loss (plus possibly BPR)
key_idea: extract meta knowledge from all views to rectify noisy edges and perform contrastive learning across views to mitigate data sparsity
datasets: real industrial recommender system in China
